title: agents-md:lint result
description: Structured output of the AGENTS.md linter. Emitted to stdout as JSON when invoked with --json; otherwise rendered to a terminal table.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration. Spec SC/perf target: <= 2000 for a 500-line AGENTS.md with 50 make targets.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier. Known families: schema.required_section, repo.make_target_exists, repo.command_exists, repo.docker_service_exists, repo.ci_file_exists, generated.in_sync, generated.header_present.

subject.description: The thing being checked (section name, target, path). Null when not applicable.
